port.description: Port for the local proxy server (default: 3456)

claudeBinaryPath.description: Path to the claude CLI binary (default: 'claude')

authToken.description: Bearer token for proxy auth (default: uses gateway token)

mcpConfig.description: Paths to MCP server config JSON files (passed as --mcp-config)

allowedTools.description: Tool names to allow (e.g. ["Bash", "Read", "Edit"]). Passed as --allowedTools

disallowedTools.description: Tool names to deny (e.g. ["Bash(rm:*)"]). Passed as --disallowedTools

permissionMode.description: Permission mode for the CLI session (e.g. 'default', 'plan', 'bypassPermissions')

pluginDirs.description: Directories to load Claude Code plugins from (passed as --plugin-dir)

addDirs.description: Additional directories to allow tool access to (passed as --add-dir)

appendSystemPrompt.description: Extra system prompt text appended to every CLI invocation

maxBudgetUsd.description: Maximum dollar amount to spend per request (passed as --max-budget-usd)
